findings.location: s1 — code block, ui_plugins line comment
findings.description: The code block comment for ui_plugins/ has been changed from the source text. Knowledge file shows `# プロジェクト固有UIプラグイン` but the source code block says `# UI開発基盤プロジェクトカスタマイズ用フォルダ`. These are not equivalent: the source describes it as a customization folder for the UI framework, not merely a folder for project-specific plugins.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `├── ui_plugins/            # UI開発基盤プロジェクトカスタマイズ用フォルダ`

findings.description: The description for nablarch_plugins_bundle omits the update procedure: 'UI基盤のアップデートを行う際に洗い替えを行う'. This is operationally important — it tells users that when updating the UI framework, the entire directory should be replaced wholesale.
findings.source_evidence: Source: 'リリース物をそのまま格納し、UI基盤のアップデートを行う際に洗い替えを行う。(プロジェクト側での改変は禁止)'

findings.location: s1 — table row for web_common など
findings.description: The description for web_common omits '実装工程以降で使用する', which specifies that this project is only used from the implementation phase onward. This is relevant timing/lifecycle information for users deciding when to work with web_common.
findings.source_evidence: Source: '実際にサーバ環境にデプロイされる資源を格納するプロジェクト。実装工程以降で使用する。'

findings.location: s1 — code block, ui_demo directory contents
findings.description: The directory tree for ui_demo is missing the ss12AC/ entry. The source shows both ss11AC/ and ss12AC/ to illustrate that there are multiple per-subsystem directories. Omitting ss12AC/ removes evidence that this pattern repeats for each subsystem.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `│     ├── ss11AC/         # 業務画面JSP(サブシステム毎)\n│     ├── ss12AC/`
